channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - Calamity Anime的 Screening Grosses US$3,000,000 U.S. Box Office
item.description: 1st 3 episodes of final part of Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War ranked at #8 in U.S. box office ― Box Office Mojo is listing Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity, the fourth and final part... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity Anime's Screening Grosses US$3,000,000 in U.S. Box Office

item.description: Anime premieres this fall on Netflix ― Netflix began streaming on Monday the second teaser trailer for the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 anime: The anime will premiere this fall. The new main characters... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Anime Streams 2nd Teaser Trailer
